message:
refactor(web): clippy-driven style improvements across middleware, request_region, debug

middleware.rs:
- Refactor BulkheadMiddleware::call() from match to map_or_else()
  for more idiomatic Option handling
- Simplify RetryMiddleware::call() delay logic by moving clone
  after the sleep block

request_region.rs:
- Elide explicit lifetime: impl<'a> RequestContext<'a> → impl RequestContext<'_>
- Refactor extract_panic_message() from if-else chain to nested
  map_or_else() for cleaner downcast handling

debug.rs:
- Add ubs:ignore annotation documenting that synchronous debug server
  TcpStreams are short-lived (one request/response cycle) and
  close-on-drop is acceptable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
